DF Wu

Five portfolio styles. Same engineer. Pick the one that fits.

Noir

Noir

Dark refined. Monospace accents, amber highlights, polished developer tool aesthetic.
Linen

Linen

Warm editorial. Serif headings, cream tones, magazine feature article feel.
Glass

Glass

Modern glassmorphism. Frosted cards, gradient backgrounds, SaaS landing page vibe.
Ink

Ink

High contrast bold. Black & white with electric blue, strong geometry, content-forward.
Dusk

Dusk

Cosmic gradient. Teal-purple glow, ethereal spacious feel, creative technologist space.

Built with Astro · GitHub
